annotation_target.structure: Lyrical peak antecedent — melody soars with elaborate ornaments
key_moments: m33 melody rises toward lyrical peak
teaching_goals: shape the phrase toward the peak — arc toward m.35
ornaments require arm weight, not just finger speed
style_tips: this is one of the piece's expressive summits

teaching_notes.note: The ornamental peak — arm weight supports the melodic line even through the trills.
technique: arm weight on melody note before ornament

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 33–36 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2, view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 33–36 of the Nocturne — what is the character here?
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 33–36.
Measures 33–36 bring one of the Nocturne's lyrical peaks — the melody soars above the broken-chord accompaniment with rich ornamentation. The emotional intensity is high. Let me loop mm. 33–36.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 33–36: lyrical peak, melody soars with rich ornamentation, high emotional intensity.
